title: paneion pratensiforme
intro: Paneion pratensiforme, also known as Field Horsetail or Equisetum arvense, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paneion pratensiforme include reducing inflammation and pain, improving urinary tract issues, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations of Paneion pratensiforme include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
